hibernate-mapping.query: SELECT employee FROM com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee as employee, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EmployeeBankAccount as eeBA, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as company, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as compServices WHERE eeBA.Employee=employee AND eeBA.BankAccount.AccountNumberEnc in (:accountNumberEncList) AND eeBA.BankAccount.RoutingNumber=:routingNumber and employee.Company=company and employee.Company!=:pCompany and compServices.Company=company and (compServices.StatusCd='Terminated' or (exists (from company.OnHoldReasonSet as onHoldReason where onHoldReason.ExpirationDate is null)))

Select employee from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee as employee where cs.Company.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and cs.Company=comp and employee.Company=comp order by comp.CreatedDate, employee.CreatedDate, employee.SourceEmployeeId

Select employee from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee as employee where comp.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Company=comp and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and employee.Company=comp and ( (employee.ModifiedDate >= :fromDate and employee.ModifiedDate < :toDate) ) order by comp.CreatedDate, employee.CreatedDate, employee.SourceEmployeeId

Select count(*) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EmployeeWagePlan as wagePlan, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee as employee where comp.Id = :companyId and employee.Company=comp and wagePlan.Employee = employee

select distinct employee from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee employee join employee.Company comp join comp.CompanyServiceSet compService where lower(COALESCE(cast(employee.FirstName as java.lang.String),'')) = lower(COALESCE(cast(:firstName as java.lang.String),'')) and lower(COALESCE(cast(employee.LastName as java.lang.String),'')) = lower(COALESCE(cast(:lastName as java.lang.String),'')) and compService.StatusCd = :statusCd

select distinct employee from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee employee where employee.Company = :company and not exists ( from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun pr join pr.PaycheckSet paycheck where paycheck.SourceEmployee = employee and pr.PaycheckDate >= :checkDate )
UPDATE com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee SET PersonaId=:personaId, Email=:email, ModifiedDate=:modifiedDate, ModifierId=:modifierId WHERE Id=:empUUId
UPDATE com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee SET ConsumerRealmId=:consumerRealmId, ModifiedDate=:modifiedDate, ModifierId=:modifierId WHERE Id=:empUUId

select distinct employee from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee employee join employee.Company comp where lower(employee.FirstName) = lower(:firstName) and lower(employee.LastName) = lower(:lastName) and comp.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCode and lower(employee.Email) = :email and regexp_replace(employee.Phone, '[^0-9]', '') = :phone and employee.TaxIdEnc in :ssnList

select distinct employee from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee employee join employee.Company comp where lower(COALESCE(cast(employee.FirstName as java.lang.String),'')) = lower(COALESCE(cast(:firstName as java.lang.String),'')) and lower(COALESCE(cast(employee.LastName as java.lang.String),'')) = lower(COALESCE(cast(:lastName as java.lang.String),'')) and comp.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCode and lower(COALESCE(cast(employee.Email as java.lang.String),''))= :email and regexp_replace(employee.Phone, '[^0-9]', '','g') = :phone and employee.TaxIdEnc in :ssnList

select distinct emp.id from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as paychk, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as payrun, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee as emp where paychk.SourceEmployee = emp and paychk.Company.id = :companySeq and (CASE WHEN (:isDD = TRUE) THEN paychk.DDEmployee ELSE '1' END) is not null and paychk.PayrollRun = payrun and emp.Company.id = :companySeq and paychk.CreatedDate > :fromDate and payrun.PaycheckSettlementDate >= :settlementFromDate and payrun.PaycheckSettlementDate <= :settlementToDate and emp.Email is not null and emp.IsDgDisassociated = 0 and emp.ConsumerRealmId is null and emp.PersonaId is null and emp.StatusCd = 'Active'

select empPItem.Id, empPItem.Amount, compPItem.Id, compPItem.Status, pItem.PayrollItemCode, qbdtPItemInfo.OvertimeMultiplier from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EmployeePayrollItem as empPItem, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee as emp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyPayrollItem as compPItem, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollItem as pItem, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.QbdtPayrollItemInfo as qbdtPItemInfo where empPItem.Employee = emp and empPItem.CompanyPayrollItem = compPItem and qbdtPItemInfo.CompanyPayrollItem = compPItem and compPItem.PayrollItem = pItem and emp.Id=:employeeId and pItem.PayrollItemType='Compensation'
